requirement_topic.en: Therapeutic-Claim Boundary between Cosmetics and TGA-Regulated Goods
requirement_topic.zh: 化妆品与TGA监管治疗用品之间的治疗性宣称边界
requirement_topic.zht: 化妝品與TGA監管治療用品之間的治療性宣稱邊界

summary.en: In Australia, a product promoted for therapeutic use, or represented with therapeutic claims such as treating, preventing, or curing disease or a medical condition, may be a therapeutic good regulated by the Therapeutic Goods Administration. A product presented as a cosmetic in China may still fall within the TGA framework if Australian presentation, claims, ingredients, or intended use cross the therapeutic boundary.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚，若产品宣传用于治疗用途，或作出治疗、预防、治愈疾病或医学状况等治疗性宣称，可能属于由治疗用品管理局（TGA）监管的治疗用品。即使产品在中国作为化妆品销售，若其澳大利亚呈现方式、宣称、成分或预期用途跨越治疗性边界，仍可能落入TGA框架。
summary.zht: 在澳洲，若產品宣傳用於治療用途，或作出治療、預防、治癒疾病或醫學狀況等治療性宣稱，可能屬於由治療用品管理局（TGA）監管的治療用品。即使產品在中國作為化妝品銷售，若其澳洲呈現方式、宣稱、成分或預期用途跨越治療性邊界，仍可能落入TGA框架。

standards_or_laws: Therapeutic Goods Act 1989 — definition and regulation of therapeutic goods
TGA guidance on whether a product is a cosmetic or therapeutic good

summary.en: China also prohibits cosmetics from claiming medical effects, but Chinese special cosmetic categories and accepted functional claims do not automatically determine Australian TGA status. Claims such as anti-acne, repair of eczema, treatment of dandruff, antibacterial disease prevention, or sunscreen use may require separate Australian classification analysis.
summary.zh: 中国同样禁止化妆品宣称医疗作用，但中国特殊化妆品类别及可接受功效宣称并不自动决定澳大利亚TGA状态。祛痘、修复湿疹、治疗头皮屑、抗菌防病或防晒用途等宣称，可能需要单独进行澳大利亚分类分析。
summary.zht: 中國同樣禁止化妝品宣稱醫療作用，但中國特殊化妝品類別及可接受功效宣稱並不自動決定澳洲TGA狀態。祛痘、修復濕疹、治療頭皮屑、抗菌防病或防曬用途等宣稱，可能需要單獨進行澳洲分類分析。

standards_or_laws: CSAR 2021 — cosmetics must not claim medical effects
NMPA Administrative Measures for Cosmetic Labelling — prohibited medical and false claims

gap.en: Review all Australian-facing pack copy, website copy, marketplace listings, influencer scripts, and Chinese-to-English translations for therapeutic wording. If therapeutic claims remain, the product may require ARTG entry or another TGA pathway before import or supply; if the product is kept as a cosmetic, claims should be revised to cosmetic-only presentation supported by evidence.
gap.zh: 应审查所有面向澳大利亚的包装文案、网站文案、电商平台页面、达人脚本及中译英文案，识别治疗性措辞。如保留治疗性宣称，产品在进口或供应前可能需要ARTG收录或其他TGA路径；如保持为化妆品，则应将宣称修改为仅限化妆品属性且有证据支持的表述。
gap.zht: 應審查所有面向澳洲的包裝文案、網站文案、電商平台頁面、達人腳本及中譯英文案，識別治療性措辭。如保留治療性宣稱，產品在進口或供應前可能需要ARTG收錄或其他TGA路徑；如保持為化妝品，則應將宣稱修改為僅限化妝品屬性且有證據支持的表述。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory boundary check — goods with therapeutic claims or therapeutic use may require TGA regulation before supply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CN cosmetics cannot claim medical effects, but CN cosmetic status is not determinative in Australia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do a TGA boundary review before Australian launch; therapeutic claims can move a cosmetic into therapeutic goods regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】在澳大利亚上市前应进行TGA边界审查；治疗性宣称可能使化妆品转入治疗用品监管。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】在澳洲上市前應進行TGA邊界審查；治療性宣稱可能使化妝品轉入治療用品監管。
